prompt: 用 Python 寫一個函式，透過 Newsleopard EDM API 建立並送出一封行銷活動信件。目標群組 SN 是 grp-001，主旨「六月新品上市」，寄件人名稱「品牌電子報」，寄件地址 news@example.com，HTML 內容帶個人化變數 NAME。要支援立即寄送和排程寄送兩種模式。
expectations: Base URL is https://api.newsleopard.com
Authentication uses x-api-key header (not Bearer token)
POST request to /v1/campaign/normal/submit endpoint

Request body uses nested structure with form (containing name, selectedLists), content (containing subject, fromName, fromAddress, htmlContent, footerLang), and config (containing schedule and ga objects)
form.selectedLists is an array of group SNs (the value grp-001 from the prompt is used either directly in the code or accepted as a parameter)
Schedule uses config.schedule.type: 0 for immediate send and 1 for scheduled send, with config.schedule.timezone and config.schedule.scheduleDate for scheduled mode
Variable syntax uses ${NAME} format (not {{NAME}} — that is SureNotify syntax)
Subject length constraint mentioned or validated (max 150 chars)

prompt: Write a Node.js function using axios to send a transactional order confirmation email via the SureNotify API. The email should go to multiple recipients, each with personalized order_id and customer_name variables. Include proper error handling for the success/failure response.
expectations: Base URL is https://mail.surenotifyapi.com
Authentication uses x-api-key header
POST request to /v1/messages endpoint

The API request payload sent to SureNotify has recipients as an array of objects where each object contains name (string), address (string), and a variables object for personalization — the variables must be a nested object in the payload, not top-level fields
Variable syntax in subject/content uses {{variable_name}} format (double curly braces)
Handles response that contains both success[] array (with id and address) and failure{} object (with addresses as keys and error messages as values)
Max 100 recipients per request constraint mentioned or enforced

prompt: Implement a SureNotify webhook signature verification middleware for Express.js. The middleware should extract the signature from the request header, compute the expected HMAC-SHA256 digest, and reject requests with invalid signatures. Show how to apply it to a webhook route.
expectations: Extracts signature from x-surenotify-signature request header
HMAC-SHA256 algorithm is used for signature computation
The SureNotify API key (from environment variable or config) is used as the HMAC secret
Payload for HMAC is the concatenation of message id + eventType from the webhook body (not the raw body)
Uses timing-safe comparison (e.g., crypto.timingSafeEqual or equivalent) to prevent timing attacks
Returns 401 or 403 for invalid signatures, proceeds with next() for valid ones

prompt: 用 Python 寫一個函式，透過 SureNotify API 發送 SMS 簡訊通知。收件人是台灣手機號碼 0912345678，country_code 為 886，內容包含公司名稱「測試公司」和一個驗證碼變數 code。要處理回傳結果。
expectations: Base URL is https://mail.surenotifyapi.com
Authentication uses x-api-key header
POST request to /v1/sms/messages endpoint
SMS content includes company name (NCC regulation requirement)
Variable syntax uses {{code}} format (double curly braces) for SureNotify
recipients[].address is numeric only (no + prefix), and country_code is a separate field in the recipient object
Handles response with success/failure results

prompt: Write a Python script that fetches campaign performance reports from the Newsleopard EDM API for all campaigns sent in the last 30 days. For each campaign, print the open rate, click rate, and bounce rate. Use the reporting endpoints.
expectations: Base URL is https://api.newsleopard.com
Authentication uses x-api-key header
GET request to /v1/report/campaigns with startDate and endDate query parameters to get campaign codes
POST request to /v1/report/campaigns/metrics to get metrics for each campaign
Extracts and displays open rate, click rate, and bounce rate from the response

prompt: 幫我用電子豹的 API 在 Python 程式中查詢最近 30 天活動的開信率，並將結果存成 CSV。
expectations: Uses HTTP requests to call the REST API (not MCP tool references)
Base URL is https://api.newsleopard.com
Authentication uses x-api-key header
GET request to /v1/report/campaigns with startDate and endDate parameters
Writes results to CSV file
Does not reference MCP server or MCP tools

prompt: Write a TypeScript function that uses the Newsleopard SureNotify API to send a password reset email with a reset_link variable, then polls the event status until delivery is confirmed or times out after 60 seconds.
expectations: Base URL is https://mail.surenotifyapi.com (SureNotify, not EDM)
POST to /v1/messages for sending
Variable syntax uses {{reset_link}} (double curly braces, not ${reset_link})
Authentication uses x-api-key header
Implements polling loop with timeout logic
